text: Good morning Jarvis! Any major events scheduled for today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Wednesday, March 12. You have backlog grooming with Greg at 1 PM, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need patient onboarding immediately. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. I checked the recent logs for that. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that helping Ethan with his homework tonight. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! School projects are fun. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that looking over our mortgage options. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Smart financial planning. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily refused to eat her dinner today. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Bedtime can be a challenge. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. Great consistency with running. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick log: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Got it, Mike. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has patient onboarding. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Let's break this down. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping patient onboarding in the MVP. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. He is doing so well. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. Refinancing is a great leverage point. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. That sounds like a sweet moment. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! That's good medical feedback. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, I'm reviewing the patient onboarding specs for Vertex Health. Our Twilio integration is throwing 504 rate limit errors during signups. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. I checked the recent logs for that. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Made good progress on my work tasks today. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
